scope: Paid (Google Ads) visits only. US visitors. Internal/test visits excluded.
method: Based on PostHog session recordings for paid (Google Ads) visitors: each visit's start time, landing page, clicks, form activity and outcome. Anything unusual (such as an odd click pattern) is flagged for review and confirmed before being reported as an issue, rather than assumed.

posthog.filter: Paid Search channel, US, test visits excluded

reconciliation.note: June 15 had 6 paid clicks (Google Ads) and 4 recorded paid visits (67% coverage). 2 paid clicks were not captured as recordings, typical of very short or instant bounces. All four recorded visits landed on the Madison residential roofing page and left without starting the contact form (three short bounces; one desktop visitor browsed for about three minutes). No form submissions on the day, matching 0 qualified paid leads in the conversion dashboard for June 15.

sessions.label: Visit 1
sessions.verdict: Came in from a Google ad to the Madison residential roofing page on a desktop, browsed for about 25 seconds with no form typing, then left (a bounce).

sessions.label: Visit 2
sessions.verdict: Came in from a Google ad to the Madison residential roofing page on a desktop, browsed for about half a minute with no form typing, then left (a bounce).

sessions.label: Visit 3
sessions.verdict: Came in from a Google ad to the Madison residential roofing page on a desktop, looked around the page for about three minutes (a few clicks, no form typing), then left without starting the contact form.

sessions.label: Visit 4
sessions.verdict: Came in from a Google ad to the Madison residential roofing page on a mobile phone, browsed for about ten seconds with no form typing, then left (a quick bounce).

insights.headline: 6 paid clicks and 4 recorded paid visits on June 15, no form activity
insights.body: Google Ads recorded 6 paid clicks from US visitors on June 15. PostHog captured 4 of them as recorded visits (67% coverage); the other 2 were not captured, typical of very short or instant bounces. None of the recorded visits started or submitted the contact form.

insights.headline: All four visits landed on the Madison residential roofing page
insights.body: Every recorded paid visit on June 15 came from a Google ad to the Madison residential roofing page. Three were short bounces and one desktop visitor browsed the page for about three minutes before leaving.

insights.headline: No form starts, submissions, or anything flagged
insights.body: There were no form starts, no submissions, no phone taps and no confirmed friction on June 15, and no visit showed an unusual pattern that needed a closer look.

insights.headline: A steady, lower-intent day
insights.body: June 15 had moderate paid volume (6 clicks) but no contact-form engagement, matching 0 qualified paid leads in the conversion dashboard for the day.

data_notes: Window: June 15, 2026 (US Central). Each visit is dated by its exact start time in US Central time.
Scope: paid (Google Ads) visits only, US visitors, internal and test visits excluded.
Privacy: visitor names and emails are not shown. Visits are referenced by anonymous labels and recording links only.
Paid clicks for June 15: 6 (from the conversion dashboard's Google Ads daily series). 4 of the 6 clicks were captured as recorded visits (67%); not every paid click results in a recording.
All four recorded visits browsed and left with no form typing; there were no form starts, submissions, phone taps or confirmed friction on June 15.
Weekly totals (June 9-15): 28 paid clicks, 21 recorded visits, 2 form starts, 1 submission.
headline_state: Paid visitor sessions for June 15 (US Central). 6 paid clicks and 4 recorded paid visits (67% coverage), all on the Madison residential roofing page with no form typing (three short bounces and one ~3-minute desktop browse), and 0 form submissions. No visits flagged for review. June 15 paid clicks are reconciled against the conversion dashboard.
